data.title: KAITO hits 2.12 USDT, setting a new record high
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: OKX market data shows that KAITO broke through 2.1 USDT, reaching a maximum of 2.12 USDT, setting a new historical high, and is currently trading at 2.04 USDT.

data.title: Apple Cancels Cloud Encryption Feature Following UK Order
data.description: According to Foresight News, Apple (AAPL.O) has decided to cancel its cloud encryption feature in response to a backdoor order issued by the UK government. Previously, Foresight News reported that Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin commented on the situation, stating that if Apple chooses to exit the UK market rather than compromise user data, he would purchase additional Apple devices.

data.title: Elliott Investment Management Drives Southwest’s Historic 1,750 Job Layoffs
data.description:
Southwest Airlines plans to lay off 1,750 employees, marking its first major job cuts in 53 years, to save $210 million this year.
The post Elliott Investment Management Drives Southwest’s Historic 1,750 Job Layoffs appeared first on Tokenist.
source: https://tokenist.com/elliott-investment-management-drives-southwests-historic-1750-job-layoffs/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=elliott-investment-management-drives-southwests-historic-1750-job-layoffs

data.title: SIREN is the winning project of BNB Chain Meme Liquidity Program Day 3
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News BNB Chain announced that the winning project of Meme Liquidity Plan Day 3 is SIREN. As of the time of posting, SIREN's trading volume is 13.16 million US dollars. BNB Chain announced that it will issue 200,000 US dollars in liquidity funds to support SIREN.
It was previously reported that Binance Alpha had launched SIREN on February 19.

data.title: U.S. February One-Year Inflation Rate Expectations Reach New High
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the final value for the United States' one-year inflation rate expectations in February stands at 4.3%. This matches the anticipated figure of 4.30% and marks the highest level since November 2023.

data.title: U.S. Consumer Sentiment Falls Short Of Expectations In February
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the final reading of the University of Michigan's Consumer Sentiment Index for February in the United States was 64.7, falling short of the expected 67.8 and the previous value of 67.8. Additionally, the long-term inflation expectations for February saw the largest month-on-month increase since May 2021.

data.title: U.S. February PMI Data Shows Mixed Economic Signals
data.description: According to PANews, the preliminary data for the U.S. February S&P Global Manufacturing PMI reached 51.6, marking an eight-month high. In contrast, the S&P Global Services PMI for February recorded a preliminary value of 49.7, the lowest in 25 months. Additionally, the S&P Global Composite PMI for February was reported at 50.4, hitting a 17-month low. Following these reports, the U.S. Dollar Index (DXY) experienced a brief decline of over ten points, currently standing at 106.46.

data.title: Solana: Interest-bearing stablecoin coming soon
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Solana published a statement on the X platform stating that it will soon launch an interest-bearing stablecoin that is not locked and can be used safely on the chain.
